text.message: BiggDogg is winning for the month
can't let him notch another victory
John is leading the year and has won the past two months
Not intentionally - out and on my phone
It won’t let me click some things…
Do we play random dice or normal distribution?
We need to change that. It’s awful
Brian is in the lead by far
that would be awkward if we lost Brian
I'm in last place for the month
when is the last time 6 was rolled?
Half the time the buttons aren't working for me.  Must be an Internet issue
man, boote relentlessly trading with John
Yeah I should stop doing trades that benefit me
No one else would when I did for years. So I’m done with that. It just hurt me
you traded with Patrick who has 9 points?
Yeah but doesn’t excuse it if he is going to chastise people for trading with others…
boote definitely has 9, but how do I?
Sorry, it just isn't registering my end turns
I can win on my turn if you attack boote
boote, lets just let this play out one more turn
